title: How White Noise Improves Sleep & Focus
description: Discover how a simple white noise machine can mask distractions, boost sleep quality, and sharpen focus. Learn the science, portable tips, and daily habit tricks to make it work for you. #WhiteNoise #SleepBetter #Focus #Wellness #Productivity
topic: white noice mashine for better sleep and focus

slides.topSection: Left shows a chaotic city noise icon, right shows a tossing‑and‑turning sleeper icon, a large red X sits in the center, and the caption reads ‘Masks disruptive sounds’
slides.bottomSection: Left shows a gentle wave icon, right shows a peaceful sleeper icon, a large green check sits in the center, and the caption reads ‘Creates soothing background’
